reason: Backend testing requirements: one test file per module, strict-mode schema assertions, tmp_path for FS tests, no mocking of filesystem
Frontend testing conventions: Vitest + jsdom, createMemoryHistory pattern, vi.mock for API calls, one render test per route, tests/ mirror source layout
Component testing expectations: render through route, use findByRole/findByText, avoid data-testid unless ambiguous
Source module under test — AppSettings model, load/save/merge functions
Settings HTTP endpoints (GET/PUT /api/settings) and create_app factory
atomic_write_bytes used by save_settings — needed for understanding temp file handling in tests
Reference pattern for FastAPI TestClient endpoint tests
Reference pattern for stub injection via create_app() and error-case testing
Reference pattern for route render test with createMemoryHistory + vi.mock + QueryClientProvider
API client functions to mock in route tests (getPapers, getConcepts, getQueries, etc.)
Type definitions for API response shapes used in route tests
